description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden desk with a dark, polished finish and rounded corners. The front side features three drawers on the left, each with a metallic handle, and an open leg space on the right, typical of executive or office desks. The sides are solid panels with subtle wood grain texture, and the back is plain with no visible compartments or features. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for supporting office equipment or paperwork. The drawers are slightly open in one view, revealing their function as storage compartments. The overall design is robust and traditional, making it suitable for use in offices, reception areas, or urban administrative environments.
description: A large, dark wooden desk with three side drawers and a broad, polished top. It features metallic handles and a classic, sturdy design.
description_view_0: The back of the desk, showing a plain, solid wood panel with rounded edges and no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the depth of the desk and two partially open drawers with metallic handles.
description_view_2: The front of the desk, displaying three drawers with metallic handles on the left and an open leg space on the right.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, showing a solid wood panel with no drawers or handles visible.
